posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently dropdowns aren’t useable in automations. There is only one template automations that uses dropdown, which is very specific. We need “When dropdown changes to something”. Status columns have a limit of 40 labels, but dropdowns have 500.

What are you trying to achieve

More options for dropdown column automations.
